From: rieck-petersen@shipnet.de <rieck-petersen@shipnet.de>

To: chartering@varitasnavigation.com
Subject: MV HADEEL

OPEN TARRAGONA, SPAIN 24 NOV - TRY ANY INCL PERIOD OPTO 1 YEAR
M/V HADEEL 
30,420 MTS DWT ON 9.815 M DRAFT - SD/BC - BUILT 2010-01 AT TSUJI HEAVY 
INDUSTRIES JIANGSU IN CHINA - CLASS DNV GL - FLAG PANAMA 
LOA 178.7M / BEAM 28.4M - HO/HA 5/5 - GRAIN 40,731CBM / BALE 38,695CBM 
GROSS TONNAGE (GT): 19972 - NET REGISTERED TONNAGE (NRT): 10404 
GEAR 4 X 30 TS CRANES BSS HOOK - NO GRABS FITTED, NO GRABS ON BOARD 
LDT 7,323 MT - VESSEL IS NOT FITTED FOR THE NEW PANAMA CANAL. 
VESSEL IS CO 2 FITTED. 
BWTS EQUIPMENT ONBOARD IS TECHCROSS ECS OMSM ( USCG APPROVED ) 
VESSEL IS NOT SCRUBBER FITTED. 
VESSEL CRANES TO BE OPERATED BY QUALIFIED SHORE PERSONNEL EMPLOYED 
AND PAID BY CHARTS AT CHARTS ENTIRE RISK/RESPONSIBILITY AND EXPENSE.

RESTRICTIONS: NO GRABS FITTED, NO GRABS ON BOARD
VESSEL IS NOT FITTED FOR THE NEW PANAMA CANAL

restrictions: Vessel is not fitted for the new Panama Canal. No grabs fitted, no grabs on board. Vessel cranes to be operated by qualified shore personnel employed and paid by charterers.
